name: Reese's Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shortening (or 3/4 cup Butter or margarine, softened)
2/3 cup Semisweet or Milk chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: St. Louis Post-Dispatch 5/20/96
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Stir together flour and baking soda in a bowl.
In a large mixing bowl, beat shortening, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla until creamy.
Add eggs; beat well.
Gradually add the flour mixture, beating well.
Stir in chips.
Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
Let cool slightly on cookie sheets, then transfer to wire racks to cool completely.
Yield: About 5 dozen cookies.
